## 🚀 Features

- **Restart after update**: New "Restart Now" button appears after a successful self-update. The app re-launches automatically and the browser reloads when the new version is ready — no manual restart needed.
- **Categorized release changelogs**: GitHub releases now show changes grouped by type (Features, Bug Fixes, Build & CI, Documentation).

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

- **SSO Region default**: AWS SSO authentication no longer fails when the SSO Region field is left empty — defaults to `us-east-1` to match the placeholder hint.
